home.heroDesc: Permissionless. AI-vetted. Multi-chain. With native fiat rails, Z-FINANCE integration, and refundable sales. Every feature the competition lacks — and then some.
home.featuresDesc: We built Z-PAD to solve every pain point of PinkSale, DAO Maker, Seedify, and every other launchpad combined.
home.howDesc: From zero to invested in under 3 minutes.
home.ctaDesc: Join 54,000+ investors already backing the next generation of Web3 projects through the most advanced launchpad ever built.
home.feature1Desc: Every project gets an AI Score 0-100 analyzing tokenomics, smart contracts, team history, and market fit. No other launchpad has this.
home.feature2Desc: Buy tokens directly with credit card, PIX, or wire transfer via Z-PAY. Zero other launchpads offer this.
home.feature3Desc: Full refund within 48h of TGE if KPIs not met. Protects investors — pioneered by DAO Maker, now default here.
home.feature4Desc: Your on-chain reputation replaces staking requirements. No more locking $50k in platform tokens to access good projects.
home.feature5Desc: Fair Launch, Presale, Private, LBP, Bonding Curve — we support everything. Competitors support 1-2.
home.feature6Desc: Native Z-FINANCE fintech integration: invest with fiat balance, receive profits in USD/BRL, use positions as collateral.
home.how1Desc: Link MetaMask, Obelisk-Z, or pay with fiat — no wallet required.
home.how2Desc: Verify once. Unlocks private rounds across the entire ZETTA ecosystem.
home.how3Desc: Browse AI-vetted projects. Participate with crypto or fiat.
home.how4Desc: Claim at TGE, track vesting, stake for extra rewards.

create.label: Launch
create.desc: Configure, AI-audit, and deploy your token sale in minutes.
create.connectDesc: You must connect your wallet and complete creator KYC to launch a project on Z-PAD.
create.projectInfoDesc: Start with the basics. KYC is {strong} for creators.
create.fieldDescPlaceholder: Describe your project, the problem it solves, and your vision...
create.fieldDescHint: Minimum 100 characters. ZION AI will analyze for red flags.
create.refundableDesc: Investors get refund if KPIs aren't met. Signals confidence, attracts higher-quality participants.
create.saleConfigDesc: Set pricing, caps, and sale schedule.
create.reviewDesc: ZION AI has analyzed your configuration.
create.termsAccept: I agree to Z-PAD's Terms of Service, confirm all information is accurate, and understand smart contract parameters cannot be modified after deployment.
create.deployedDesc: Your project is now live on Z-PAD. ZION AI is monitoring your contract in real-time.
create.toastAiCheck: ZION AI running final contract pre-check...
create.locksDesc: Define vesting locks for team, marketing and any reserved tokens. Builds investor trust.
create.noLocksHint: No locks configured. Recommended: lock team and marketing tokens.
create.stealthLaunchDesc: Your project page stays hidden until the sale start time. Only wallets with a direct invite link can access it before launch.
create.saleTypePresaleDesc: Fixed price, hard cap, whitelist optional. Most common type.
create.saleTypeFairLaunchDesc: No hard cap. Everyone pays the same price. Fully community-driven.
create.saleTypePrivateDesc: Whitelist-only. Ideal for angel investors and strategic rounds.
create.saleTypeLbpDesc: Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool. Price starts high and decreases over time.
create.saleTypeBondingCurveDesc: Price increases as more tokens are purchased. No rug possible.
create.antiBotSectionDesc: Prevent bots and snipers from dominating your sale
create.antiBotEnableDesc: Blocks known MEV bots and enforces transaction rules at contract level
create.maxWalletPctDesc: Maximum % of total supply a single wallet can hold during the sale
create.txDelayDesc: Minimum seconds between two buys from the same wallet
create.maxTxPerBlock: Max TXs per Block per Wallet
create.maxTxPerBlockDesc: Limits how many transactions a single wallet can make per block
create.antiBotNote: Anti-bot settings are enforced on-chain and cannot be bypassed. They apply from sale start to TGE.
create.whitelistSectionDesc: Restrict participation to approved wallets only
create.whitelistEnableDesc: Only wallets on the list will be able to participate in this sale
create.whitelistHint: Each address gets the same allocation limits set in Sale Config

terms.s1Body: By accessing or using the Z-PAD platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the platform.
terms.s2Body: You must be at least 18 years old and comply with all applicable laws in your jurisdiction to use Z-PAD. The platform is not available in jurisdictions where participation in token sales or DeFi activities is prohibited.
terms.s3Body: Participating in token launches involves significant financial risk. You may lose all funds invested. Past performance is not indicative of future results. ZION AI scores are informational tools and do not constitute financial advice.
terms.s4Body: Project creators must complete KYC verification through our institutional-grade verification partner. Failure to maintain valid KYC may result in suspension of services.
terms.s5Body: Z-PAD charges a {platformPct}% fee on successful raises ({stakerPct}% for stakers holding {minZ}+ Z tokens). A {listingBnb} BNB listing fee applies to project creation. Fees are subject to change with 30 days notice.
terms.s6Body: Z-PAD and the ZETTA ecosystem are provided on an as-is basis. We disclaim all warranties and shall not be liable for any losses arising from smart contract exploits, market volatility, or third-party actions.
terms.s7Body: For legal inquiries, contact legal@zettaword.com. For platform support, use the ZION AI assistant or visit our documentation.

privacy.s1Body: We collect wallet addresses, on-chain transaction data, KYC verification data (processed by Veriff), and usage analytics. We do not collect unnecessary personal data.
privacy.s2Body: Your data is used to provide platform services, comply with legal requirements (including AML/KYC obligations), improve the ZION AI scoring engine, and send important service notifications.
privacy.s3Body: We do not sell your personal data. We share data with KYC providers (Veriff), blockchain infrastructure partners, and law enforcement when legally required. All on-chain data is publicly visible by nature.
privacy.s4Body: KYC data is retained for 5 years to comply with financial regulations. Transaction logs are stored for 3 years. You may request deletion of non-regulatory data by contacting us.
privacy.s5Body: We use minimal, privacy-preserving analytics (no third-party tracking). Session cookies are used for authentication only. You may disable non-essential cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.s6Body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, rectify, or erase your personal data. Submit requests to privacy@zettaword.com. We respond within 30 days.
privacy.s7Body: Data Controller: ZETTA WORD. Contact: privacy@zettaword.com.

kyc.frontSideHint: Clear photo of the front of your document
kyc.backSideHint: Clear photo of the back of your document
kyc.pageDesc: One-time verification. Unlocks private rounds, fiat payments, and governance weight boost.
kyc.docHint: Ensure all corners are visible, text is legible, and no flash glare. Documents must be valid (not expired).
kyc.selfieDesc: Take a clear photo of yourself holding your ID document. Make sure your face and the document are both clearly visible.
kyc.submittedDesc: Your verification is being reviewed by Veriff. This typically takes 2–10 minutes. You'll receive a notification once approved.
kyc.fileHint: JPG, PNG or PDF — max 10 MB
kyc.poweredBy: Powered by Veriff · Encrypted end-to-end · GDPR compliant

backtest.configPrompt: Configure parameters and run the simulation to see results
backtest.disclaimerText: Past performance does not guarantee future results. This simulation uses historical price data and AI scores for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

zion.riskHighConcDetail: {pct}% of portfolio in a single asset. A single bad exit can wipe out the majority of gains.
zion.riskModConcDetail: {pct}% concentration in top holding. Consider adding 2-3 more positions.
zion.riskGoodDivDetail: No single asset dominates. Risk is spread well.
zion.riskUnderwaterDetail: {symbols} are negative. Consider DCA-ing or cutting losses on assets below your stop-loss.
zion.riskCliffDetail: {symbols} are fully locked. Sell pressure may spike at unlock.
zion.riskCliffAction: Plan exit strategy before TGE unlocks.
zion.riskIdleDetail: {symbols} have tokens ready. Unclaimed tokens miss potential staking rewards.
zion.riskIdleAction: Claim and stake or LP immediately.
zion.riskWinnersDetail: {items} — strong AI scores validated by market performance.
zion.summaryHealthy: Your portfolio shows strong fundamentals. Diversification is solid and your best performers are carrying gains.
zion.summaryModerate: Some risks detected. Addressing concentration and unclaimed tokens would improve your position.
zion.summaryHigh: Multiple risk factors identified. Immediate action recommended to protect capital.
zion.summaryCritical: Critical portfolio risks detected. Urgent rebalancing advised.
zion.initialMsg: Hey! I'm ZION, your AI assistant for Z-PAD. I can analyze any project, explain tokenomics, help you find opportunities, or answer questions about the platform. What would you like to know?
zion.respRisk: Based on my analysis, {name} has a {riskLevel} risk profile (AI Score: {score}/100). {summary}
zion.respScore: {name} scored {score}/100 on my AI Vetting Engine. Breakdown: {breakdown}. This composite score evaluates tokenomics, smart contract security, team verification, market positioning, liquidity ratios, and community signals.
zion.respZpad: Z-PAD is the next-generation decentralized launchpad from the ZETTA ecosystem. Unlike PinkSale or Binance Launchpad, we combine: AI-powered vetting, fiat on-ramp (PIX, credit card), native banking via Z-FINANCE, KYC-enforced creator verification, refundable sales (DYCO), and reputation-based allocation. We are the only launchpad where everything is connected — wallet, DEX, banking, and now AI.
zion.respTop: Based on current AI Scores, here are my top picks: {list}.
zion.respFairLaunch: A Fair Launch is a token sale where everyone gets tokens at the same price — no presale advantages, no VC discounts. Z-PAD supports Fair Launches as one of 5 sale mechanics (Fair Launch, Presale, Private, LBP, Bonding Curve).
zion.respFees: Z-PAD platform fees: {platformPct}% standard on successful raises, {stakerPct}% for users staking {minZ}+ Z ({discountPct}% discount), {listingBnb} BNB listing fee for creators. Compared to PinkSale (2-5%) and CEX launchpads, we offer the most competitive rates plus way more features.
zion.respKyc: KYC verification unlocks higher allocation tiers, access to private sales, fiat payment methods, governance voting weight boost, and tax reporting tools. We use institutional-grade KYC (Veriff). Takes ~5 minutes. All creators launching on Z-PAD must complete KYC.
zion.respRefund: Refundable Sales (DYCO) let you get your money back within 48h of TGE if the project fails to hit agreed KPIs. Think of it as warranty for crypto. Projects tagged Refundable commit to this upfront.
zion.respReputation: Your Reputation Score (0-100) replaces staking requirements. Earned through successful past participations, KYC verification, community contributions, governance votes. Higher reputation = bigger allocation cap. No need to lock $50,000 in tokens.
zion.respClaim: To claim vested tokens: Dashboard -> Positions -> click any position with Claim Available -> confirm transaction. Tokens appear in your wallet instantly. You can claim multiple times without losing the vesting schedule.
zion.respLaunch: To launch your project on Z-PAD: Click Create in the nav, follow the 5-step wizard (Info -> Tokenomics -> Sale -> Review -> Deploy), complete creator KYC (mandatory), my AI will pre-screen your contract. Launch fee: {listingBnb} BNB + {platformPct}% of raise. Takes ~30 min, no code required.
zion.respDefault: That's a great question. Z-PAD's edge comes from combining permissionless launches with institutional-grade vetting, fiat rails, and AI analysis. If you want specific guidance, try asking about a particular project, feature, or mechanism.

errors.errorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Our team has been notified. You can try again or head back home.

docs.title: Z-PAD Documentation
docs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the most advanced decentralized launchpad.
docs.introBody1: Z-PAD is the next-generation decentralized launchpad built on the ZETTA ecosystem. Unlike legacy platforms, Z-PAD combines AI-powered project vetting, native fiat on-ramps, refundable sales, and reputation-based allocation — all in one platform.
docs.introBody2: Whether you are an investor looking for the next 100x or a project founder ready to launch, Z-PAD gives you every tool you need with institutional-grade security and transparency.
docs.introBody3: Z-PAD supports 7 blockchains: BSC, Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, ZettaChain, Solana, and Base — with more chains added regularly.
docs.featuresBody1: Every feature on Z-PAD was designed to solve a real pain point from competing platforms like PinkSale, DAO Maker, and Seedify.
docs.f1Body: Every project receives an AI score from 0 to 100 across 6 dimensions: tokenomics, smart contract, team, market fit, liquidity, and community. No other launchpad has this.
docs.f2Body: Buy tokens directly with credit card, PIX, or bank transfer via Z-PAY. No crypto required to get started.
docs.f3Body: If a project fails to meet KPIs within 48 hours post-TGE, investors receive a full refund. Your capital is protected by default.
docs.f4Body: Your on-chain reputation score replaces heavy staking requirements. Build history, earn access — no need to lock $50,000 in platform tokens.
docs.f5Body: Launch and invest across BSC, Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, ZettaChain, Solana, and Base from a single interface.
docs.f6Body: Native fintech integration: invest with fiat balance, receive profits in USD/BRL, use token positions as collateral.
docs.investorsBody1: To participate in a presale on Z-PAD, connect your Web3 wallet (MetaMask, Trust Wallet, WalletConnect), complete KYC verification, and ensure you have the required balance for your target tier.
docs.investorsBody2: Each sale has a minimum and maximum buy limit. Your maximum allocation is determined by your Reputation Score and staked Z tokens. Higher reputation = higher allocation without needing to stake more.
docs.i1Body: Z-PAD uses 4 tiers: Silver (5,000+ Z staked), Gold (20,000+ Z), Diamond (80,000+ Z), and Legendary (200,000+ Z). Higher tiers gain earlier access and larger allocations.
docs.i2Body: KYC is required to participate. The process takes under 5 minutes. Your data is stored securely and never shared with third parties.
docs.i3Body: Tokens are distributed according to the project's vesting schedule. TGE (Token Generation Event) releases a percentage immediately; the rest vests linearly over the defined period. Claim directly from your dashboard.
docs.i4Body: For projects with DYCO enabled: if the project fails to hit its listed KPIs within 48 hours of TGE, you can claim a full refund from the sale contract — no questions asked.
docs.creatorsBody1: Any team can submit a project for listing on Z-PAD. The process is fully on-chain and transparent. ZION AI analyzes your submission automatically within minutes.
docs.creatorsBody2: Before creating a sale, ensure your smart contract is deployed and audited. Z-PAD strongly recommends Cyberscope, CertiK, Trail of Bits, or Hacken for audits.
docs.c1Body: Submit your project name, symbol, description, chain, and sale type (Presale, Fair Launch, LBP, or Bonding Curve).
docs.c2Body: Define your total supply and allocation: presale %, liquidity %, team %, and marketing %. Liquidity must be at least 51% to pass ZION AI review.
docs.c3Body: Configure vesting locks for team and marketing tokens. Cliff or linear vesting options available. Locks are enforced on-chain and visible to all investors.
docs.c4Body: Set your token rate, soft cap, hard cap, min/max buy per wallet, and sale dates.
docs.c5Body: ZION AI runs a final pre-check and the sale contract is deployed. Your project goes live immediately and appears on the Z-PAD discovery feed.
docs.cFeeNote: Listing Fee: 1 BNB (or equivalent). Platform Fee: 2% of funds raised, split 1% platform / 1% to Z stakers.
docs.lockerBody1: The Z-PAD Token Locker allows anyone to lock ERC-20 tokens with a verifiable, immutable on-chain schedule. Used by project teams to demonstrate commitment to investors.
docs.lockerBody2: All locks are public and searchable. Investors can verify any lock directly from the project detail page.
docs.l1Body: All tokens are released at once on the unlock date. Typically used for liquidity locks.
docs.l2Body: Tokens are released daily at a constant rate from lock date to unlock date. Typically used for team and marketing allocations.
docs.l3Body: Navigate to /locker → New Lock → Enter token contract address, amount, purpose, vesting type, and unlock date → Approve token spend → Confirm transaction. Done.
docs.l4Body: Locks can only be extended (unlock date pushed forward), never shortened. This is enforced by the smart contract.
docs.zionBody1: ZION is Z-PAD's proprietary AI vetting engine. Every project submitted to the platform is automatically analyzed across 6 dimensions, producing a score from 0 to 100.
docs.zionBody2: ZION does not replace human judgment — it amplifies it. Use the score as a starting point, then read the full AI report for context.
docs.z1Body: Evaluates supply distribution, liquidity ratio, vesting schedules, and inflation risk. Projects with >70% liquidity and locked team tokens score highest.
docs.z2Body: Checks for known vulnerability patterns, audit status, ownership renouncement, and anti-bot protections.
docs.z3Body: Verifies on-chain wallet history, KYC status, previous projects, and team transparency.
docs.z4Body: Analyzes project category competitiveness, whitepaper quality, and go-to-market strategy.
docs.z5Body: Evaluates LP lock duration, lock percentage, and DEX listing plan.
docs.z6Body: Measures social engagement, Telegram/Discord growth rate, and organic vs. bot activity.
docs.zScoreGuide: Score guide: 90–100 = Excellent · 75–89 = Strong · 60–74 = Moderate · Below 60 = High Risk
docs.stakingBody1: Staking Z tokens on Z-PAD increases your allocation tier, boosts your reputation score, and earns you a share of platform fees.
docs.stakingBody2: There is no lock-up requirement to stake. You can unstake at any time, though early unstaking (before 30 days) forfeits accumulated rewards for that cycle.
docs.s1Body: Base access to all public sales. 1.2× allocation multiplier. Earns 0.5% of platform fee pool.
docs.s2Body: Priority access window (1 hour before public). 1.5× allocation multiplier. Earns 1% of fee pool.
docs.s3Body: Early access window (6 hours before public). 2× allocation multiplier. Earns 2% of fee pool. Governance vote weight ×2.
docs.s4Body: First access window (24 hours before public). 3× allocation multiplier. Earns 4% of fee pool. Direct contact with Z-PAD team for project vetting.
docs.governanceBody1: Z-PAD is governed by Z token holders through the ZIP (Z-PAD Improvement Proposal) system. Any holder with 1,000+ Z can submit a proposal.
docs.governanceBody2: Proposals go through a 7-day voting window. Passing threshold is 51% For votes with a minimum 5% quorum of circulating supply.
docs.g1Body: Navigate to /governance → Select an active proposal → Cast your vote (For / Against / Abstain). Voting power equals your staked Z balance at the snapshot block.
docs.g2Body: Click 'New Proposal' on the governance page. Describe the change, its impact, and implementation steps. A 10,000 Z deposit is required (returned if the proposal passes).
docs.g3Body: Protocol changes, treasury allocations, fee adjustments, new chain support, partnerships, and emergency actions (fast-track, 24h voting).
docs.podsBody1: Pods allow multiple wallets to pool BNB and invest together in a sale, sharing a single boosted allocation. Ideal for communities and DAOs.
docs.podsBody2: Each pod has a tier (Silver, Gold, Diamond, Legendary) determined by total BNB pooled. Higher tiers unlock larger allocations and boost multipliers.
docs.p1Body: Connect your wallet → /pods → New Pod → Set a name, target project, and BNB target. Share your invite link with up to 10 members.
docs.p2Body: Use an invite link or browse open pods in the public feed. Your contribution earns a proportional share of the pod's total allocation.
docs.p3Body: Silver: 1.5× · Gold: 2.5× · Diamond: 4× · Legendary: 8×. Multipliers apply to the pod's base allocation in each sale.
docs.p4Body: Silver: 5+ BNB, max 5 members · Gold: 20+ BNB, max 8 members · Diamond: 80+ BNB, max 10 members · Legendary: 200+ BNB, max 10 members.
docs.feesBody1: Z-PAD fees are minimal, transparent, and partially redistributed to Z stakers — aligning platform incentives with the community.
docs.fee1Body: 1 BNB (or equivalent in ETH/SOL) paid once at deployment. Covers smart contract deployment, ZION AI analysis, and listing on the discovery feed.
docs.fee2Body: 2% of total funds raised, charged only if the soft cap is reached. Split: 1% to Z-PAD treasury, 1% distributed pro-rata to all active Z stakers.
docs.fee3Body: 0.1 BNB flat fee per lock transaction. No percentage fee on the locked amount.
docs.fee4Body: There are no withdrawal fees, no claim fees, and no annual maintenance fees. What you see is what you pay.
docs.feeNote: Fees may be reduced or waived for projects that achieve a ZION AI score of 95+ or for Z-FINANCE integrated projects.

tokenCreator.label: Token Creator
tokenCreator.desc: Deploy a custom ERC-20 token in minutes — no code required. Configure supply, features and taxes, then deploy directly to your chosen network.
tokenCreator.mintableDesc: Owner can mint new tokens after deployment
tokenCreator.burnableDesc: Holders can permanently burn their tokens
tokenCreator.taxNote: Taxes require a tax wallet to receive collected fees
tokenCreator.feeTip: Deployment fee: 0.05 BNB (covers gas + platform fee). Your token will be verified and listed on the token explorer.

airdrop.label: Airdrop / Multisender
airdrop.desc: Send tokens to hundreds of wallets in a single transaction. Paste addresses manually or upload a CSV file.
airdrop.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to start an airdrop
airdrop.feeTip: Platform fee: 0.01 BNB per airdrop batch. Gas is paid by the sender.

otc.label: OTC Market
otc.desc: Buy and sell tokens directly with other users at fixed prices — no liquidity pool, no slippage, no intermediary.
otc.connectToBrowse: Connect your wallet to view listings and create offers
otc.createDesc: Set your token, amount, price and expiry. Buyers can purchase directly from your listing.
otc.feeTip: Platform fee: 1% of the total deal value, charged to the buyer at settlement.

partners.label: Ecosystem Partners
partners.desc: Z-PAD is backed by leading investors, secured by top auditors, and integrated with the most trusted infrastructure in Web3.
partners.becomePartnerDesc: Interested in integrating with Z-PAD or listing your project? Reach out to our partnerships team.
